## Testing

Please list exact commands and results:

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings`

## Screenshots / Recordings

Add screenshots or recordings for visible UI changes.

## Risk Checklist

- [ ] Git commands use argument arrays, not shell strings.
- [ ] Destructive actions require user confirmation in the UI.
- [ ] AI output is review-only and never auto-applied.
- [ ] Errors are shown clearly in the Git output console.
- [ ] Settings or credentials are not logged.
